definitions.text: A covering for the head, usually attached to a larger garment such as a jacket or cloak. A head covering placed on falcons to inhibit their vision. A head and neck covering placed on horses to protect against insects and sunlight, to slow coat growth and for warmth.
A head covering placed on falcons to inhibit their vision.
A head and neck covering placed on horses to protect against insects and sunlight, to slow coat growth and for warmth.
To extend out from (something), in the manner of a hood.
To grow over the eyelid but not the eye itself.
Relating to inner-city everyday life, both positive and negative aspects; especially people’s attachment to and love for their neighborhoods.

examples: What’s goin’ down in the hood?
